title: boechera lincolnensis
intro: Boechera lincolnensis, also known as Lincoln's rockcress or Lincoln's cress, is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is a perennial herb that has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant contains isothiocyanates, which have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, contributing to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. Traditionally, Boechera lincolnensis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and optimal preparation methods.
